prompt: Embed the meme into a Zoom UI: add the top toolbar, participant names beneath each face, and the bottom control icons.
prompt_refined:
Edit image 2 (the Zoom meeting interface). Replace its four empty video panels with the four corresponding panels from image 1 (the 'Brain' comic meme).
Specifically, embed the top-left panel of image 1 into the top-left video slot of image 2.
Embed the top-right panel of image 1 into the top-right video slot of image 2.
Embed the bottom-left panel of image 1 into the bottom-left video slot of image 2.
Embed the bottom-right panel of image 1 into the bottom-right video slot of image 2.
Maintain all existing Zoom UI elements from image 2, including the top toolbar and the bottom control bar.
Add a participant name beneath each of the four embedded meme panels, in a style consistent with Zoom's participant name display.
objects: Top-left panel from 'Brain' comic ("THIS IS BRAIN")
Top-right panel from 'Brain' comic ("BRAIN'S JOB IS TO THINK")
Bottom-left panel from 'Brain' comic ("BUT BRAIN IS AMBITIOUS")
Four participant names (text) below the comic panels
